generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance TMC4671EvalCartController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement, providing state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance TMC4671EvalHoistController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement, providing state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement of gantry crane"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist movement of gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lifts containers at hoist end"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TMC4671EvalCartController
]

instance HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TMC4671EvalHoistController
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB including sensor readings and motor states"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartMotorStateDataTransmitted, HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib, CapellaEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib, CapellaEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, HMIService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, HMIService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontrollerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance MkDocsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MkDocs for documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMIService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryRecommendationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, FaultNotificationInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for operator control and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]

instance TrajectoryRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory recommendations for crane operation"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance FaultNotificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault notifications for system adjustments"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for crane dynamics"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of crane data"
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Storing historical data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator control and configuration via HMI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System adjustments based on fault notifications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, TMC4671EvalCartController, TMC4671EvalHoistController, PSU
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane"
]

instance PSU : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power Supply Unit for the gantry crane system"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for movement, homing, and trajectory execution generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to the motor controllers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with data logging and validation performed at the system's operational frequency without specified discrete intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Single PC-hosted system with Docker containers for Database, Dashboard, and MQTT Broker; Python applications for other services; MQTT protocol for inter-service communication and physical crane interface."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane during active use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds; breach notifications trigger operator intervention."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface (Python) communicates with motor controllers; MQTT protocol for service-to-service communication; Arduino handles sensor data acquisition (specific hardware protocols not detailed)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for Database, Dashboard, and MQTT Broker containers; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for other components."
]
